programs.title: Outback Truckers
programs.desc: House mover Robbie MacKay is dragging a house up a mountain and long-haul drivers Mish Aladin and Dru Norman... hauling two massive mining tippers, are trapped by rising floodwaters.

programs.title: Deadliest Roads
programs.desc: Lisa Kelly and G.W. take on the same road that almost sent G.W. over the edge the day before.

programs.title: Kings Of Pain
programs.desc: Adam and Rob serve up their most annoying stings in the history of the Pain Index, chasing them with a tiny fish that has venom to die for.

programs.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programs.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programs.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programs.desc: Merv Hughes Fishing is a light hearted fishing show with some ripping catches, a few yarns (mostly true), mateship and of course a splash of comedy thrown in.

programs.title: Creek To Coast
programs.desc: This week we tackle Tasmania, rugged beauty and superb fishing awaits.
